full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic
audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as
deemed fit.]
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include imposition of monetary penalty, requirement of full provisioning, directions to conduct staff accountability exercises, forensic audits, and r

controls.control_objective: To ensure safeguard their interest vis-à-vis such statutory dues
controls.control_description:
In the
circumstances, a UCB shall safeguard their interest vis-à-vis such statutory dues.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to safeguard their interest vis-à-vis such statutory dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy themselves that there are no arrears of provident fund and other statutory dues of the borrowers by obtaining a declaration from them that all
controls.control_description:
Therefore, a UCB shall satisfy themselves that there are no arrears of Provident Fund
and other statutory dues of the borrowers by obtaining a declaration from them that
all such dues have been duly paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy themselves that there are no arrears of provident fund and other statutory dues of the borrowers by obtaining a declaration from them that all

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called for only in cases where banks have reason to doubt the borrowers' declaration
controls.control_description:
Proof in this regard may be called for only in cases
where banks have reason to doubt the borrowers' declaration.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called for only in cases where banks have reason to doubt the borrowers' declaration

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered sufficient
controls.control_description:
production of a receipt evidencing the payment of the dues or a
certificate from the auditors of the borrower or any other similar proof may be
considered sufficient.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered sufficient

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to consider such cases on merits
controls.control_description:
In the case of stressed borrowers where there are arrears for
reasons beyond the control of the borrowers, banks may continue to consider such
cases on merits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to consider such cases on merits

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that borrowers enjoying credit facilities, pay the provident fund payments and similar other statutory dues promptly
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall ensure that borrowers enjoying credit facilities, pay the provident fund
payments and similar other statutory dues promptly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that borrowers enjoying credit facilities, pay the provident fund payments and similar other statutory dues promptly

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider suitable restrictions on the outflow of funds
controls.control_description:
Apart from insisting on the borrowers to indicate a
definite programme for clearance of arrears, a UCB shall consider suitable restrictions
on the outflow of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider suitable restrictions on the outflow of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure incorporate an appropriate declaration in their application forms for grant / renewal / enhancement of credit facilities so as to ensure <image> that
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall incorporate an appropriate declaration in their
application forms for grant / renewal / enhancement of credit facilities so as to ensure
<image>
that the position regarding the statutory dues is disclosed therein.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to incorporate an appropriate declaration in their application forms for grant / renewal / enhancement of credit facilities so as to ensure <image> that

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally be reflected in their audited annual accounts
controls.control_description:
In respect of the
corporate borrowers and non-corporate borrowers, the amount of statutory dues shall
normally be reflected in their audited annual accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally be reflected in their audited annual accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from the chartered accountant for this purpose
controls.control_description:
In case audited accounts do
not indicate the position clearly, a certificate shall be obtained from the Chartered
Accountant for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from the chartered accountant for this purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure finance a borrower already availing credit facility from another bank without obtaining a 'no objection certificate' from the existing financing bank
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not finance a borrower already availing credit facility from another
bank without obtaining a 'No Objection Certificate' from the existing financing
bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to finance a borrower already availing credit facility from another bank without obtaining a 'no objection certificate' from the existing financing bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on the audited financial statements from the borrowers enjoying large limits
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on the audited financial statements from the borrowers enjoying large limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure take suitable precautions to avoid irregular practices such as sanctioning advances beyond discretionary powers and / or without proper credit apprais
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall take suitable precautions to avoid irregular practices such as
sanctioning advances beyond discretionary powers and / or without proper credit
appraisal in order to minimise chances of frauds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take suitable precautions to avoid irregular practices such as sanctioning advances beyond discretionary powers and / or without proper credit apprais

controls.control_objective: To ensure delegate specific powers to the branch managers and other functionaries at the head office level as also to the chairman in the matter of sanction of
controls.control_description:
(1) The Board of Directors shall delegate specific powers to the Branch Managers
and other functionaries at the Head Office level as also to the Chairman in the
matter of sanction of advances and expenditure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to delegate specific powers to the branch managers and other functionaries at the head office level as also to the chairman in the matter of sanction of

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be introduced to ensure that powers are exercised within the limits prescribed and any transgressions are immediately reported to head office
controls.control_description:
A system shall also be
introduced to ensure that powers are exercised within the limits prescribed and
any transgressions are immediately reported to Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be introduced to ensure that powers are exercised within the limits prescribed and any transgressions are immediately reported to head office

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine during the course of inspection of branches whether powers have been exercised properly and any unauthorised exercise of powers shall immediat
controls.control_description:
(2) The internal inspectors shall examine during the course of inspection of
branches whether powers have been exercised properly and any unauthorised
exercise of powers shall immediately be brought to the notice of Head Office.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine during the course of inspection of branches whether powers have been exercised properly and any unauthorised exercise of powers shall immediat

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to the board of directors
controls.control_description:
Similarly, sanctions beyond discretionary powers by the Chairman, Chief
Executive Officer and other executives at the Head Office shall also be reported
to the Board of Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure desist from the unhealthy practice of conveying sanction of advances orally or on telephone
controls.control_description:
The higher authorities at various levels shall desist from the unhealthy practice
of conveying sanction of advances orally or on telephone.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to desist from the unhealthy practice of conveying sanction of advances orally or on telephone

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken:
controls.control_description:
(1) Only in exigencies, where sanctions are made on telephone / oral instructions
of higher functionaries or sanctions beyond discretionary powers have to be
resorted to, the following steps shall be taken:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained by the sanctioning / disbursing authorities explaining the circumstances under which sanctions were made
controls.control_description:
(i) Record of such instructions / sanctions shall be maintained by the
sanctioning / disbursing authorities explaining the circumstances under
which sanctions were made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained by the sanctioning / disbursing authorities explaining the circumstances under which sanctions were made

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained by the disbursing authority / official within a week / fortnight
controls.control_description:
(ii) Written confirmation of the competent sanctioning authority shall be
obtained by the disbursing authority / official within a week / fortnight.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained by the disbursing authority / official within a week / fortnight

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be reported to head office within a stipulated time and head office shall meticulously follow up receipt of such returns
controls.control_description:
(iii) Sanctions within discretionary powers shall also be reported to Head
Office within a stipulated time and Head Office shall meticulously follow
up receipt of such returns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be reported to head office within a stipulated time and head office shall meticulously follow up receipt of such returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure diligently scrutinise the statements / returns and shall initiate stringent action against erring functionary(s) if they are found to <image> have ind
controls.control_description:
(iv) Head Office shall diligently scrutinise the statements / returns and shall
initiate stringent action against erring functionary(s) if they are found to
<image>
have indulged in unauthorised sanctioning.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to diligently scrutinise the statements / returns and shall initiate stringent action against erring functionary(s) if they are found to <image> have ind

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed their discretionary powers for granting loans and advances
controls.control_description:
(2) Officials shall exercise powers delegated to them judiciously and shall not
exceed their discretionary powers for granting loans and advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed their discretionary powers for granting loans and advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed seriously and the guilty shall be punished suitably
controls.control_description:
Violations, if
any, in this regard shall be viewed seriously and the guilty shall be punished
suitably.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed seriously and the guilty shall be punished suitably

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effective so as to ensure that the security obtained from borrowers by way of hypothecation, pledge, etc
controls.control_description:
(2) Post sanction follow-up of loans and advances shall be effective so as to
ensure that the security obtained from borrowers by way of hypothecation,
pledge, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effective so as to ensure that the security obtained from borrowers by way of hypothecation, pledge, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place more stringent safeguards, especially where accounts show sign of turning into npas
controls.control_description:
(3) Accounts showing sign of turning into NPAs: A UCB shall put in place more
stringent safeguards, especially where accounts show sign of turning into
NPAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place more stringent safeguards, especially where accounts show sign of turning into npas

controls.control_objective: To ensure strengthen their monitoring system by resorting to more frequent inspections of borrowers' godowns, ensuring that sale proceeds are routed through the
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the UCB shall strengthen their monitoring system by
resorting to more frequent inspections of borrowers' godowns, ensuring that
sale proceeds are routed through the borrower's accounts maintained with
the UCB and insisting on pledge of the stock in place of hypothecation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strengthen their monitoring system by resorting to more frequent inspections of borrowers' godowns, ensuring that sale proceeds are routed through the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned only in respect of first class customers and even in such cases the extent of limits and the need therefore shall be subjected to thorou
controls.control_description:
(4) Drawals against clearing cheques shall be sanctioned only in respect of first
class customers and even in such cases the extent of limits and the need
therefore shall be subjected to thorough scrutiny and periodic review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned only in respect of first class customers and even in such cases the extent of limits and the need therefore shall be subjected to thorou

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue banker's cheques / pay orders / demand drafts against instruments presented for clearing, (unless the proceeds thereof are collected and credite
controls.control_description:
A UCB
shall not issue banker's cheques / pay orders / demand drafts against
instruments presented for clearing, (unless the proceeds thereof are collected
and credited to the account of the party) or to borrowers whose accounts are
already overdrawn or likely to be overdrawn with the issue of such
instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue banker's cheques / pay orders / demand drafts against instruments presented for clearing, (unless the proceeds thereof are collected and credite

controls.control_objective: To ensure be normally confined to bank drafts and government cheques and only to a limited extent against third party cheques
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) Drawals against clearing instruments shall be normally confined to bank
drafts and Government cheques and only to a limited extent against third
party cheques.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be normally confined to bank drafts and government cheques and only to a limited extent against third party cheques

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent genuine trade transactions and strict vigilance shall be observed against assisting kite-flying operations
controls.control_description:
(6) Cheques against which drawals are allowed, shall represent genuine trade
transactions and strict vigilance shall be observed against assisting kite-flying
operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent genuine trade transactions and strict vigilance shall be observed against assisting kite-flying operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure , therefore, take appropriate steps to review and tighten their internal administration and control measures so as to eliminate the scope for misuse /
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall, therefore, take appropriate steps to
review and tighten their internal administration and control measures so as to
eliminate the scope for misuse / diversion of funds and malpractices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , therefore, take appropriate steps to review and tighten their internal administration and control measures so as to eliminate the scope for misuse /

controls.control_objective: To ensure take serious view of instances of misuse of power, corruption and other malpractices indulged by the members of staff and erring staff members shall b
controls.control_description:
(2) A UCB shall take serious view of instances of misuse of power, corruption
and other malpractices indulged by the members of staff and erring staff
members shall be given punishments befitting the seriousness of the
irregularity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take serious view of instances of misuse of power, corruption and other malpractices indulged by the members of staff and erring staff members shall b

controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically attempt to make an assessment of the working capital requirements of the borrower based on the latest data available, whether limits cont
controls.control_description:
the review shall specifically attempt to make an assessment of the
working capital requirements of the borrower based on the latest data available,
whether limits continue to be within the need-based requirements and according
to the UCB's prescribed lending norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specifically attempt to make an assessment of the working capital requirements of the borrower based on the latest data available, whether limits cont

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a mechanism for proper monitoring of the end use of funds
controls.control_description: A UCB shall have a mechanism for proper monitoring of the end use of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a mechanism for proper monitoring of the end use of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure take appropriate action including <image> recalling the loans, reduction of sanctioned limits, imposing penal charges etc
controls.control_description:
Wherever diversion is observed, it shall take appropriate action including
<image>
recalling the loans, reduction of sanctioned limits, imposing penal charges etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take appropriate action including <image> recalling the loans, reduction of sanctioned limits, imposing penal charges etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep a proper vigil over requests of their clients for cash withdrawals from their accounts for large amounts
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall keep a proper vigil over requests of their clients
for cash withdrawals from their accounts for large amounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep a proper vigil over requests of their clients for cash withdrawals from their accounts for large amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally be treated as a fraud
controls.control_description:
Whenever stocks
under hypothecation to cash credit and other loan accounts are found to have
been sold but the proceeds thereof not credited to the loan account, such action
shall normally be treated as a fraud.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally be treated as a fraud

controls.control_objective: To ensure take immediate steps to secure the remaining stock so as to prevent further erosion in the value of the available security as also other action as war
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the UCB shall take
immediate steps to secure the remaining stock so as to prevent further erosion
in the value of the available security as also other action as warranted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take immediate steps to secure the remaining stock so as to prevent further erosion in the value of the available security as also other action as war

controls.control_objective: To ensure be construed to have occurred if any funds borrowed are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower, to the detriment of the fin
controls.control_description:
Siphoning of funds shall be construed to have occurred if any funds borrowed
are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower, to the
detriment of the financial health of the entity or of the lender.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be construed to have occurred if any funds borrowed are utilised for purposes unrelated to the operations of the borrower, to the detriment of the fin

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek to ensure end use of funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the chartered accountants for the purpose
controls.control_description:
In cases of project financing, a UCB shall seek to ensure end use of funds by, inter
alia, obtaining certification from the Chartered Accountants for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek to ensure end use of funds by, inter alia, obtaining certification from the chartered accountants for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be limited to only those borrowers whose integrity and reliability were above board
controls.control_description:
In
case of short-term corporate / clean loans, such an approach ought to be
supplemented by 'due diligence' on the part of lenders themselves, and to the
extent possible, such loans shall be limited to only those borrowers whose
integrity and reliability were above board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be limited to only those borrowers whose integrity and reliability were above board

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend entirely on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants but strengthen their internal controls and the credit risk management system t
controls.control_description:
A UCB, therefore, shall not depend
entirely on the certificates issued by the Chartered Accountants but strengthen
their internal controls and the credit risk management system to enhance the
quality of their loan portfolio.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend entirely on the certificates issued by the chartered accountants but strengthen their internal controls and the credit risk management system t

controls.control_objective: To ensure form a part of their loan policy document for which appropriate measures shall be put in place
controls.control_description:
Needless to say, ensuring end-use of funds by a
UCB shall form a part of their loan policy document for which appropriate
measures shall be put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to form a part of their loan policy document for which appropriate measures shall be put in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, implement the following illustrative best practices observed in well-managed banks regarding management of npas and may put in pl
controls.control_description:
A UCB may, at its discretion, implement the following illustrative best practices
observed in well-managed banks regarding Management of NPAs and may put
in place any other practices which would result in better customer service and
business development:
(1) Frame reasonably well documented loan policy and rules;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, implement the following illustrative best practices observed in well-managed banks regarding management of npas and may put in pl

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural ba
controls.control_description:
It is advised that a UCB shall ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate
exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (Scheduled Commercial Banks
(excluding Regional Rural Banks), Local Area Banks, Small Finance Banks, and
Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial
Institutions and NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that non-individual borrowers with aggregate exposure of ₹5 crore and above from banks (scheduled commercial banks (excluding regional rural ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all fund based and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / fis to the borrower
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Exposure' for this purpose shall include all fund based and non-fund
based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all fund based and non-fund based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / fis to the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Aggregate sanctioned limit or outstanding balance, whichever is higher, shall be
reckoned for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain the position of aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or central repository of information on large credits (c
controls.control_description:
Lenders shall ascertain the position of aggregate
exposure based on information available either with them, or Central Repository of
Information on Large Credits (CRILC database or declaration obtained from the
borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain the position of aggregate exposure based on information available either with them, or central repository of information on large credits (c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit (LOU)
shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal /
enhancement of any existing exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from this provision
controls.control_description:
However, Departments / Agencies of Central
and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under Companies
Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be exempted from
this provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from this provision

controls.control_objective: To ensure encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as well as
all subsidiaries and associates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained from legal entity identifier india ltd (leiil), a subsidiary of the clearing corporation of india limited (ccil), which has been recognise
controls.control_description:
In India, LEI code may be obtained from Legal Entity Identifier India Ltd
(LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India Limited (CCIL), which has
been recognised by the Reserve Bank as issuer of LEI under the Payment and
Settlement Systems Act, 2007 and is accredited by the GLEIF as the Local Operating
Unit (LOU) in India for issuance and management of LEI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from legal entity identifier india ltd (leiil), a subsidiary of the clearing corporation of india limited (ccil), which has been recognise

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as per gleif guidelines
controls.control_description:
After obtaining LEI code, a UCB shall also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as
per GLEIF guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as per gleif guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation
of properties and appointment of valuers:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided by the following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment of valuers:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures
controls.control_description:
Policy for valuation of properties
(1) A UCB shall have a Board approved policy in place for valuation of properties
including collaterals accepted for their exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy in place for valuation of properties including collaterals accepted for their exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i
controls.control_description: (2) The valuation shall be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done by professionally qualified independent valuers i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a direct or indirect interest
controls.control_description: the valuer shall not have a direct or indirect interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a direct or indirect interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above
controls.control_description:
(3) A UCB shall obtain minimum two Independent Valuation Reports for properties
valued at ₹50 crore or above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain minimum two independent valuation reports for properties valued at ₹50 crore or above

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as a ucb is permitted to include revaluation
controls.control_description:
Revaluation of bank's own properties
In addition to the above, a UCB may keep the following aspects in view while
formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties:
(1) As a UCB is permitted to include revaluation reserves as part of Capital in
terms of Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025, it is necessary that revaluation
reserves represent true appreciation in the market value of the properties and
banks have in place a comprehensive policy for revaluation of fixed assets
owned by them.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to keep the following aspects in view while formulating policy for revaluation of their own properties: (1) as a ucb is permitted to include revaluation

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva
controls.control_description:
Such a policy shall inter alia cover procedure for identification
of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such
assets, the frequency of revaluation, depreciation policy for such assets,
policy for sale of such revalued assets etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia cover procedure for identification of assets for revaluation, maintenance of separate set of records for such assets, the frequency of reva

controls.control_objective: To ensure also cover the disclosure required to be made in the 'notes on account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed as
controls.control_description:
The policy shall also cover the
disclosure required to be made in the 'Notes on Account' regarding the details
of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed assets subject to
revaluation and accounting treatment for appreciation / depreciation etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also cover the disclosure required to be made in the 'notes on account' regarding the details of revaluation such as the original cost of the fixed as

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric
controls.control_description:
(2) As the revaluation shall reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset,
the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed
volatility in the prices of the assets in the past.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the fair value of the fixed asset, the frequency of revaluation shall be determined based on the observed volatility in the pric

controls.control_objective: To ensure reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets
controls.control_description:
Further, any change in the
<image>
method of depreciation shall reflect the change in the expected pattern of
consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reflect the change in the expected pattern of consumption of the future economic benefits of the assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall
adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of
revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall
make proper disclosures in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to these principles meticulously while changing the frequency of revaluation / method of depreciation for a particular class of asset and shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'
controls.control_description:
Policy for Empanelment of Independent valuers
(1) A UCB shall have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and
maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a procedure for empanelment of professional valuers and maintain a register / record of 'approved list of valuers'

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers
controls.control_description: (2) A UCB may prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a minimum qualification for empanelment of valuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for different classes of assets (e
controls.control_description: Different qualifications may be prescribed for different classes of assets (e.g.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for different classes of assets (e

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957
controls.control_description:
While prescribing the
qualification, a UCB shall take into consideration the qualifications prescribed
under Section 34AB (Rule 8A) of the Wealth Tax Act, 1957.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into consideration the qualifications prescribed under section 34ab (rule 8a) of the wealth tax act, 1957

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall also be guided by the relevant Accounting Standard issued by the
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be guided by the relevant accounting standard issued by the institute of chartered accountants of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest s required to be filed with the registry
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest s required to be filed with the Registry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest s required to be filed with the registry

controls.control_objective: To ensure all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders
controls.control_description:
Current Accounts, Cash Credit Accounts (CC), and Overdraft Accounts (OD) may
all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating
to credit monitoring by the lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to all be used as transaction accounts by the customers, which raises concerns relating to credit monitoring by the lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative
controls.control_description:
Explanation (1): 'Banking System' for the purpose of this Chapter shall include
Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, and Regional
Rural Banks, but excluding Payments Banks), Urban Co-operative Banks and Rural
Co-operative Banks (State Co-operative Banks and Central Co-operative Banks).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks, and regional rural banks, but excluding payments banks), urban co-operative

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system
controls.control_description:
Explanation (2): 'Exposure' for the purpose of this Chapter means the sum of all
sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the
borrower from the banking system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of all sanctioned fund-based credit facilities and non-fund-based facilities availed by the borrower from the banking system

controls.control_objective: To ensure a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Collection Account' for the purpose of this Chapter means a current
account or OD account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the
accountholder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a current account or od account used primarily for receipts of cash inflows of the accountholder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 51f of these directions
controls.control_description:
Restricted payments / cash outflows from such account shall be
subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 51F of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the conditions outlined in paragraph 51f of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers
controls.control_description:
With a view to ensuring credit discipline, lenders may include additional covenants
as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include additional covenants as per their policies in their loan agreements in mutual agreement with borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter
controls.control_description:
A bank may provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the
customer, without any restriction under this Chapter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide such cash credit facilities as per the needs of the customer, without any restriction under this chapter

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain current account or od account without any restriction in case of customers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer
controls.control_description:
A bank may maintain current account or OD account without any restriction in case
of customers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer
is less than ₹10 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain current account or od account without any restriction in case of customers where the aggregate exposure of the banking system to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s
controls.control_description:
Funds credited into a collection account shall be remitted within two working days
of receipt of such funds to a CC account, current account, or OD account maintained
with any bank in the banking system and designated by the borrower for this purpose
<image>
(hereinafter referred to as 'designated account' in this Chapter).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted within two working days of receipt of such funds to a cc account, current account, or od account maintained with any bank in the banking s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through the designated account only
controls.control_description:
Any disbursement of
overdraft limit from an OD account, which is in the nature of a collection account, shall
be through the designated account only.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through the designated account only

controls.control_objective: To ensure statutory dues such as taxes, and dues
controls.control_description:
Provided that statutory dues such as taxes, and dues, if any, to the bank maintaining
the collection account may be debited before remitting the funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to statutory dues such as taxes, and dues

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat
controls.control_description:
The restrictions placed in terms of paragraph 51D(1) of these Directions shall not
be applicable to the accounts mentioned below:
(1) Accounts opened as per the provisions of Foreign Exchange Management Act,
1999 (FEMA) and notifications issued thereunder, including accounts mandated
for ensuring compliance under the FEMA framework.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the accounts mentioned below: (1) accounts opened as per the provisions of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (fema) and notificat

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes
controls.control_description:
Provided that banks operating the above-mentioned exempted accounts shall ensure
that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified
purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that transactions in such accounts are used only for the permitted / specified purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be remitted to the designated account
controls.control_description:
Surplus funds, if any, in such accounts shall be remitted to the designated
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be remitted to the designated account

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of ensuring ongoing compliance with this Chapter, all banks shall
monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least
once every half-year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor accounts maintained with them on a regular basis, and in any case at least once every half-year

controls.control_objective: To ensure notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe
controls.control_description:
then the bank shall notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within
one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must either
be converted to a collection account or closed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to notify the customer(s) concerned promptly, and in any case within one month from the date of observing such ineligibility, that the account must eithe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility
controls.control_description:
The conversion or closure process, as
the case may be, shall be completed within three months of observing such
ineligibility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within three months of observing such ineligibility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Accounts opened in terms of these Directions shall be appropriately flagged in the
bank's core banking solution (CBS) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate
effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's core banking solution (cbs) to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level
controls.control_description:
Banks maintaining multiple accounts for a borrower shall ensure
that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the
borrower level as also at the account level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such accounts and transactions and cashflows therein are monitored at the borrower level as also at the account level

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for
transactions related to their authorised business or activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder utilise their account solely for transactions related to their authorised business or activities

controls.control_objective: To ensure not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions
controls.control_description:
These accounts shall
not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third-
party transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to not, under any circumstances, be used as pass-through channels for facilitating third- party transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so
controls.control_description:
Provided that entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator
to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to entities expressly licensed or authorised by a financial sector regulator to facilitate third-party transactions may continue to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope
controls.control_description:
However, such activities
shall strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall
not extend beyond that scope.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly be limited to the specific transactions they are authorised to do and shall not extend beyond that scope

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring
controls.control_description:
Any account that has been permitted to carry out such
third-party transactions shall be appropriately flagged in the bank's CBS to ensure
clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appropriately flagged in the bank's cbs to ensure clear identification and to facilitate effective monitoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by
the Reserve Bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage
in such activities through accounts maintained with them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that an accountholder, who is not licensed or authorised by the reserve bank to accept deposits or to provide payment services, do not engage i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas
controls.control_description:
Robust monitoring systems shall be implemented to detect the above prohibited
usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction
volumes, frequent pass-through activities, or inconsistencies between the
accountholder's stated line of business and transactions carried out through the
account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented to detect the above prohibited usage, including mechanisms to flag accounts exhibiting unusually high transaction volumes, frequent pas

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use
controls.control_description:
Term loans sanctioned by the bank shall preferably be remitted directly to the
intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use, where such beneficiary
is identifiable, rather than routing the funds through the borrower's account.]
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be remitted directly to the intended beneficiary's account(s) or for the specified end-use

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally be 80 per cent and the remaining cash credit component
controls.control_description:
In the case of borrowers enjoying working capital credit limits of ₹10 crore and above
from the banking system, the loan component shall normally be 80 per cent and the
remaining Cash Credit component.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to normally be 80 per cent and the remaining cash credit component

controls.control_objective: To ensure be
controls.control_description:
UCBs have been given freedom to change the
composition of working capital by increasing the cash credit component beyond 20
per cent or increase the loan component beyond 80 per cent, as the case may be,
if they so desire.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be

controls.control_objective: To ensure appropriately price each of the two components of working capital finance, taking into account the impact of such decisions on their cash and liquidit
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall appropriately price each of the two components of
working capital finance, taking into account the impact of such decisions on their
cash and liquidity management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appropriately price each of the two components of working capital finance, taking into account the impact of such decisions on their cash and liquidit

controls.control_objective: To ensure persuade them to go in for the loan system by offering an incentive in the form of lower rate of interest on the 'loan component' as compared to the '
controls.control_description:
In the case of borrowers with working capital (fund based) credit limit of less than
₹10 crore, a UCB shall persuade them to go in for the Loan System by offering an
incentive in the form of lower rate of interest on the 'loan component' as compared
to the 'cash credit component' The actual percentage of 'loan component' in these
cases shall be settled by the UCB with its borrower clients.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to persuade them to go in for the loan system by offering an incentive in the form of lower rate of interest on the 'loan component' as compared to the '

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered by the financing ucb only after the borrower has fully utilised / exhausted the existing limit
controls.control_description:
The release of ad hoc / additional credit for meeting temporary requirements
shall be considered by the financing UCB only after the borrower has fully
utilised / exhausted the existing limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be considered by the financing ucb only after the borrower has fully utilised / exhausted the existing limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an integral part of the board approved loan policy and credit risk management framework, and a ucb shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short
controls.control_description:
Further, timely
and comprehensive review / renewal of credit facilities shall be an integral part
of the Board approved loan policy and credit risk management framework, and
a UCB shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short review / renewal of
credit facilities without justifiable reasons.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be an integral part of the board approved loan policy and credit risk management framework, and a ucb shall avoid frequent and repeated ad-hoc / short

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought under the scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the ucb with immediate effect
controls.control_description:
Moreover, the processes
governing review / renewal of credit facilities shall be brought under the scope
of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the UCB with
immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought under the scope of concurrent / internal audit / internal control mechanism of the ucb with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the norm for single / group borrowers' credit exposure
controls.control_description:
In respect of consortium lending, the level of individual bank's share in Cash
Credit and Loan Component shall be governed by the norm for single / group
borrowers' credit exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the norm for single / group borrowers' credit exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed by a ucb in consultation with borrowers
controls.control_description:
The minimum period of the loan for working capital purposes shall be fixed by a
UCB in consultation with borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed by a ucb in consultation with borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide to split the loan component according to the need of the borrower with different maturity bases for each segment and allow roll over
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall decide to split the loan
component according to the need of the borrower with different maturity bases
for each segment and allow roll over.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide to split the loan component according to the need of the borrower with different maturity bases for each segment and allow roll over

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fully carved out of the 'loan component'
controls.control_description: Bills limit for inland sales shall be fully carved out of the 'loan component'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fully carved out of the 'loan component'

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy themselves that the bills limit is not mis-utilised
controls.control_description: A UCB shall satisfy themselves that the bills limit is not mis-utilised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to satisfy themselves that the bills limit is not mis-utilised

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down policy guidelines for periodic review of the working capital limit and the same shall be scrupulously adhered to
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall lay down policy guidelines for periodic review of the working capital
limit and the same shall be scrupulously adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to lay down policy guidelines for periodic review of the working capital limit and the same shall be scrupulously adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines already
repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
